radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the radio button group that displays subscription plan options. Controls the style, layout, and behavior of the plan selection buttons.

indicator_alignment.description: Controls the position of the radio indicator circle within each button. 'right' places it on the right side, 'none' hides the indicator entirely. Any other value or omitted defaults to left alignment.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

buttons.description: List of individual radio button items representing subscription plan options on the screen.

badge.description: Configuration for the badge label displayed on the radio button, used to highlight offers such as discounts or promotions.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

color.description: Text color of the badge in the selected state. Color value from the backend/API.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

variant.description: Badge layout variant. When set to 'v3', uses a version 3 badge layout with different sizing, positioning, and deselected-state visibility behavior.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: Whether the badge should be hidden when the radio button is in the deselected state. Only applies when variant is 'v3'.

text.description: Text displayed inside the badge label on the radio button.

selected_bg_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value from the backend/API.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color of the radio button when it is in the deselected/unselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

selected_border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value from the backend/API.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is pre-selected by default when the screen loads.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: Whether this radio button uses an enlarged layout with increased height, providing more space for content display.

id.description: Identifier for this radio button item, used to look up the associated subscription button data (CTA, pricing, package info) from the 'subscription_button' remote settings key.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the deselected/unselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

border_color.description: Border color of the radio button in the default/deselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

gradient_type.description: Gradient type applied to the badge background. 'gold' uses a gold-colored badge style. 'plus' and 'pro' map to predefined drawable resources. Other values are resolved via CascadeGradients by name (e.g. 'PRIMARY').

purchase_on_select.description: When true, selecting a radio button immediately initiates the purchase flow without requiring the user to tap a separate purchase/CTA button.

type.description: The visual style of the radio button group. When set to 'tiers_style', uses the OptimusHalfRadioButtonComponent (tiers layout). Any other value or omitted uses the default SubscriptionRadioButtonComponent.

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration for the trial reminder toggle component that allows users to opt in or out of receiving a reminder before their free trial ends.

is_enabled.description: Whether the trial reminder toggle is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the toggle is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the trial reminder toggle component data from remote settings.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration for the placeholder text displayed near the toggle components on the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the toggle placeholder text is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the placeholder text is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the toggle placeholder text data from the 'offer_toggle_placeholder_text' remote settings key.

content_id.description: Unique identifier for this screen configuration, used to look up the corresponding screen content and components from remote settings.

footer.description: Configuration for the footer component displayed at the bottom of the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the footer is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the footer is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the footer component data from remote settings.

banner.description: Configuration for the banner component displayed at the top of the subscription screen, which can contain images and associated actions.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the banner is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the banner component data (type, image URLs, actions) from the 'offer_screen_banners' remote settings key.

description.description: Configuration for the description text component on the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the description text is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the description is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the description component data from remote settings.

title.description: Configuration for the title text component displayed on the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the title text is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the title is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the title component data (text content, color, font) from the 'offer_screen_titles' remote settings key.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

close_button.description: Configuration for the close button that allows users to dismiss the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the close button is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the close button is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the close button component data from the 'subscription_screen_close_button' remote settings key.

subtitle.description: Configuration for the subtitle text component displayed below the title on the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the subtitle text is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the subtitle is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the subtitle component data (text content, color, font) from the 'offer_screen_subtitles' remote settings key.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration for the banner placeholder component, which displays a text overlay with an optional badge image and shadow on the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner placeholder component is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the banner placeholder is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the banner placeholder component data (text, badge URL, shadow config) from the 'offer_banner_placeholder_text' remote settings key.

secondary_button.description: Configuration for the secondary button component on the subscription screen, typically used for alternative actions.

is_enabled.description: Whether the secondary button is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the secondary button is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the secondary button component data from the 'offer_screen_secondary_button' remote settings key.

logo.description: Configuration for the logo component displayed on the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the logo is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the logo is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the logo component data from remote settings.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration for the package-switching toggle component that allows users to switch between different subscription package offerings (e.g. toggling a promotional offer).

is_enabled.description: Whether the switch package toggle is visible on the subscription screen. When false, the toggle is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Auto-generated internal field.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the switch package toggle component data (enabled/disabled states, package IDs, text, colors) from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings key.
